raw_transcript: Almost every night. I'll wake up at two or three in the morning and vomit, and honestly, Doctor, it looks exactly like the dinner I ate at seven PM. It's like my stomach isn't even moving it.
final_corrected_note: Almost every night. I'll wake up at two or three in the morning and vomit, and honestly, Doctor, it looks exactly like the dinner I ate at seven PM. It's like my stomach isn't even moving it.
